productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Closed Blue Casual Shoe
description: Celebrate and enhance your feminity with these absolutely stunning and comfortable shoes from catwalk. With it's vibrant colours and sleek design, this pair is perfect for everyday casual wear. Upper Suede upper with stratigically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced comfort and durability Slip on style with a pull loop on the collar for easy on/off Removable footbed to accomodate and orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with modified herringbone lugs for enhanced grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
